headline: TJX Earnings Beat, Dividend Hike and Buybacks Could Be A Game Changer For TJX Companies (TJX)
summary: In recent weeks, TJX Companies reported stronger-than-expected sales and margins, with fourth-quarter comparable sales rising and earnings per share and revenue beating analyst forecasts. Management’s decision to raise the dividend and authorize up to US$2.75 billion in share repurchases highlights confidence in the off-price model and the company’s cash-generation capacity. We’ll now explore how TJX’s earnings beat and planned dividend hike and buybacks may influence its broader...
